clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") and [PROVIDER_NAME] ("Service Provider").
This Agreement governs the provision of [PROJECT_NAME] by the Service Provider to the Client.
The Service Provider shall design a brand identity described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED] for [PROJECT_NAME], including the deliverables specified in the Deliverables Clause.
The Service Provider shall perform the brand identity design services described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED].
The Service Provider shall deliver the Deliverables to the Client on or before [DELIVERY_DATE].
The Services shall take place on [DELIVERY_DATE] at , subject to any change confirmed in writing by both Parties.
The Client shall pay the Service Provider [TOTAL_VALUE] for the Services, payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD] according to the schedule agreed between the Parties.
If the Client fails to pay any amount due by its due date, the Service Provider may charge interest on the overdue amount at [LATE_PAYMENT_RATE] per month.
The Service Provider retains copyright in the Deliverables. Upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Client receives a [LICENSE_SCOPE] license to use the Deliverables for [PERMITTED_USE].

Where the Client requests support with trademark filing, the Service Provider may assist with preparing visual materials for filing, but the Client shall be solely responsible for engaging qualified legal counsel to conduct clearance searches and file the trademark application.
Where the Services include a brand strategy workshop, the Service Provider shall facilitate it on [WORKSHOP_DATE] for an additional fee of [WORKSHOP_FEE].
Revision requests beyond [INCLUDED_REVISION_ROUNDS] rounds shall be charged at [ADDITIONAL_REVISION_FEE] per round.
The Client may request delivery within [RUSH_DELIVERY_PERIOD_DAYS] days, in exchange for an additional fee of [RUSH_DELIVERY_FEE].

Each Party shall keep confidential any non-public information disclosed by the other Party in connection with this Agreement and shall not disclose it without the disclosing Party's prior written consent.

The Client may grant the Service Provider a non-exclusive right to display the Deliverables for the Service Provider's professional portfolio and promotional purposes. This right does not apply where the Confidentiality Clause designates the Deliverables as confidential, or where [PORTFOLIO_AUTHORIZATION_DECLINED] indicates the Client has declined.
Editable source files for the Deliverables shall be provided to the Client only where [SOURCE_FILES_INCLUDED] indicates inclusion, or upon payment of an additional fee of [SOURCE_FILES_FEE].

The Service Provider shall perform the Services based on the creative brief agreed with the Client as [CREATIVE_BRIEF_REFERENCE]. Material changes to the brief after work begins shall be treated as a change under the Approval Process Clause.
The Client shall review each milestone deliverable within [APPROVAL_PERIOD_DAYS] days. If the Client does not respond within this period, the deliverable shall be deemed approved.
The Client may request up to [INCLUDED_REVISION_ROUNDS] rounds of revisions at no additional charge under this Clause, subject to the Extra Revision Rounds Clause for requests beyond this limit.
Upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Client receives a license to use the brand identity Deliverables for [PERMITTED_USE]. The Service Provider retains copyright subject to this license.
Neither Party shall be liable to the other for any indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from this Agreement.
Each Party's total liability arising from this Agreement shall not exceed [TOTAL_VALUE], except for loss arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, or fraud.

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform its obligations to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control that could not have been avoided through reasonable diligence. The affected Party shall notify the other Party without undue delay.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.

The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE]. Ambiguity: none — Trademark Responsibility explicitly disclaims legal filing services, preventing the Client from mistakenly relying on the designer for legal clearance. Duplication: Extra Revision Rounds vs Revisions kept distinct — the latter defines the included allotment, the former prices overage, mirroring the Corporate Video pattern. Loophole closed: Source Files inclusion explicitly conditioned on a Dynamic Field rather than assumed, closing a common designer/client dispute. Contradiction: none between Portfolio Authorization and Confidentiality — established precedence pattern reused. Missing protection: Trademark Responsibility Clause added given design work's proximity to (but legal distinction from) trademark registration. Complexity: kept Brand Strategy Workshop and Creative Brief as distinct optional phases reflecting genuinely separate project stages. Enforceability: revision caps and file-delivery conditions all tied to explicit Dynamic Fields. Attack: Client assumes the designer secured trademark rights to the new logo and later discovers no filing occurred — mitigated by explicit Trademark Responsibility disclaimer. Attack: Client demands source files post-delivery without having paid for them — mitigated by Source Files Clause's explicit inclusion/fee condition. Attack: Client requests unlimited concept revisions claiming the brief was never finalized — mitigated by Creative Brief Clause routing material changes through the Approval Process/Extra Revision Rounds mechanism. No further gaps found. Version 1.0.0 — Self-Review and Red Team passed — Pending Human Legal Review.
